params.name: Codex Leicester
params.source:
* Expert Scrolls (7.6%), Fragment Crafting (29.9%), Lottery Machine(0.66%), Wishing (2.7%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Aug 23, 1510 the Codex Leicester was completed and has been a family treasure since then.
The Codex Leicester is an 18-page book that covers a lot of contents, including insights into astronomy, water, rocks, and fossils, as well as light and celestial bodies. The discussion of water accounts for about one-third of the book. It took Prof Pedretti 7 years to translate it into English.
[Auction Price]
Price: 30,802,500 dollars. Collected by: Bill Gates.
